methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $15M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Defense & Security. Range: $150M - $500M.

private.name: Stark Defence

private.name: Vatn Systems

data.narrative:
SiFly is a Series A-stage Defense & Security company that has raised $15M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of two public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and eight private companies in the same sector and stage, with particular focus on three direct same-stage comparables: Stark Defence ($500M), Vatn Systems ($300M), and Ares Industries ($150M).

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis uses the $15M total raised as a baseline valuation proxy and applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A advancement, yielding $30M. Peer-median analysis across the three same-sector, same-stage comparables produces a $300M implied valuation, with the peer set ranging from $150M to $500M. The wide dispersion reflects material differences in technology maturity, customer traction, or funding velocity among peers at this stage.

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $26M (low) to $345M (median), with a point estimate of $165M. The 13x spread between methods reflects substantial uncertainty around market positioning relative to peers. Key unknowns include SiFly's product maturity relative to the three named comparables, customer pipeline specificity, and whether the company's technology addresses a differentiated subsector within Defense & Security. Calibration against Anduril Industries and Scale AI—larger private players in adjacent domains—may refine this assessment with additional operational data.
